name: com.twinbrain.unity-frontend
description: Real-time 3D brain visualization for TwinBrain. Connects to the Python WebSocket backend to display fMRI activity, run stimulation simulations, and load .pt cache files.
_upmNote:
NativeWebSocket must be added separately. Add to your project's Packages/manifest.json:
"com.endel.nativewebsocket": "https://github.com/endel/NativeWebSocket.git#upm"
